entries.gt_1fff9c5ae17195: The scientist was looking for a book with margins written in someone else's hand.
entries.gt_2037988d9d1f16: take the relay diagram before the procedural floor where cells move by radio
entries.gt_21215ec8e8a8a4: Living Archive of the District Council
entries.gt_214a21865164aa: Blindeye shoots not where you are, but where you just made noise.
entries.gt_214b605866b4be: The accelerated-aging guard booth works to the left of the contour. Pass with the right shoulder; no children.
entries.gt_215d35bc29ed88: Keep tomorrow's receipt separate from your permanent pass: a temporary one next to it is quickly recognized as expired.
entries.gt_2181debca1fe8d: do not argue with the short road; get a route or take the long detour
entries.gt_21bda333cdc724: They pay for white sand as evidence, but in the ledger it passes as calming the commission.
entries.gt_21d2257f007bd0: The Room Settler rarely comes out first: noise, theft, and night light make the room wider.
entries.gt_221e91a97316fb: The late one was not let into the canteen: his shift had not started yet, and his face was already over.
entries.gt_22203ca476e357: After the sweep, the rookie carried a bucket with both hands and asked no one to ask what was left in it.
entries.gt_2267735c283154: If the lid pulls you to open it, that is not an event yet. The event begins when you choose the recipient.
entries.gt_22bb773ed8a9e8: The inspection archive opens not with a key, but with someone else's mistake.
entries.gt_230b403c2ed8c1: Panelnik holds the wall with a slab hand: dust on the edge means armor.
entries.gt_23496f6fd6fde6: Pump Room with Reflection Under the Floor
entries.gt_236096e5cc2933: Cultists call zhelemish the first gift, and old women call it mold from a bad block.
entries.gt_2376843a1154f4: The quarantine post asks not about the cough, but about sleep, the filter, and who touched the face.
entries.gt_23c3c1ee59d0e8: check the hermodoor before the siren and do not open the leaf to a voice
entries.gt_23d876ab728a11: A liquidator assignment is short: sector, target, ammunition, withdrawal.
entries.gt_241584b1ccd887: For the Chancery Idol, a cabinet is worse than a wall: the field hooks onto the form, but dies against the card archive.
entries.gt_2421b35d57b04c: When a frightening paper is bought, it stops being evidence and becomes a route.
entries.gt_24285423e79b0c: Case L-47 in the library index sits under the letter "do not touch". That means it has already been touched.
entries.gt_242b97741882ec: Special ration is called "experimental" when they do not want to say "do not ask the ingredients".
entries.gt_2446b1b527224d: Liquidators file Govnyak into the act, and leave the names for later.
entries.gt_247ba19931e596: Sima's clinic takes antibiotics without questions, because questions do not break a fever.
entries.gt_247d1d2a2d17e4: In the refusal office, the paragraph shoots before it is read.
entries.gt_248dddabb635a9: A palm print in soot is placed where an ordinary corridor became someone's request not to ask.
entries.gt_24dc7983d45d58: The lift commission signs routes only for those who brought an order and do not argue with the button.
entries.gt_24ff4c67372236: A loop without a form drives you through the same corridor until the water runs out.
entries.gt_25099ba595dcec: Truth in the smoking room does not appear first, but when the tall tale gets tired of keeping its face.
entries.gt_25245d5d5c0bfc: Whoever carries the black idol to the window leaves with a paper trail and the same cold in their pocket.
entries.gt_2569025395848a: The Beast likes the concrete edge. In the center of the room it is stupider.
entries.gt_257d29cd7cfe4e: An assembled person grows from bustle. Buckshot slows it, slime distracts it, a hermodoor is better than heroism.
entries.gt_2586938ebba5b7: Liquidators brought order to the sector: fewer screams, fewer doors, fewer questions.
entries.gt_260a3dd20bb74c: A raw lump is fit as food only until the first reaction: after that NII writes "sample spoiled" and washes the table.
entries.gt_262469940f14f1: check the market or garbage kitchen, throw bait away from the exit, and cut a narrow passage open with fire or buckshot
entries.gt_26f5f88e7f0c74: keep a cabinet between you and the text, close in after the volley, and do not read the order in the open
entries.gt_272f9f61aa1bc1: wait out the choir at a closed door and do not answer to your name
entries.gt_276752fd4f36f9: A Shadow is not driven into a corner: there it counts faster than you.
entries.gt_277d7b8fc4d94f: In the school shelter, a door kit is worth more than a lecture.
entries.gt_27b5d0ceb22d61: If concrete scratches itself, keep one and a half cells from the panel, not your shoulder.
entries.gt_27ce535b23d4ac: The Chernobog dossier was handed over to the Ministry. Now witnesses are summoned as appendices.
entries.gt_27d96ab090183c: The Chernobog correction was rewritten so neatly that the original looks guilty.
entries.gt_27ee970d4a0d90: carry out the transparent sample, sell it at market, and decide whether to hide the receipt or surrender it as evidence
entries.gt_2817df7619ad92: find the note, give it to Yakov/NII/the Ministry, sell it, or follow the route for the sample
entries.gt_28a3fca5fbab16: After all-clear they count their own, then strangers, then fragments. By the third count, people try not to look.
entries.gt_28e99e412ed38e: The Idol is honest in only one thing: it will not go anywhere after you.
entries.gt_28f396c6b35291: If the tap coughs violet, leave without pride.
entries.gt_29597d9d938110: The cult below is practical: candles for counting, buckets for burns, a guard at the threshold, and debts on wet paper.
entries.gt_296aff2715b1ab: submit the shavings through the window or trade without a name at the market
entries.gt_29831412deb679: The angrier a sector gets, the more expensive the garbage lying there.
entries.gt_29d4e459ada2d1: Verification Corridor N3 has three prices: a stub, a forgery, or noise.
entries.gt_2a32d9bff5377e: The Pipe Automaton does not search the whole room for you: it waits for a wet straight line.
entries.gt_2a82f8daa8f99f: make noise at the entrance, step off the green firing line, and close in right after the beam
entries.gt_2a88a74281a065: At the threshold, keep the door between volleys: the ceiling is not holy, it just shoots from above.
entries.gt_2b0a6d65e5ab58: Pressure in the pipes rises before anger.
entries.gt_2bc21b04c7d1b9: choose a buyer for the shavings: NII, the cult, the Ministry, or the fast market
entries.gt_2c14319e88fabe: In the rail-less depot, a white lamp leads back if the fuse is not wasted on stupidity.
entries.gt_2c1c813c135a20: find the ration-coupon point, get the extract through the queue, theft, or water trade
entries.gt_2c3cb732d75d21: If the smoke came hard and fast, afterward it is harder to hold aim and conversation.
entries.gt_2c440e2360b67d: The Deep Shadow keeps the afterimage below the shoulder. The real body is already to the side if you ran after the stain.
entries.gt_2c8dce61a186d0: Outposts there are held not by concrete, but by filters, cartridges, and those who came back with a report.
entries.gt_2d25d259abaf05: Cartridges from the smelter are counted twice: when they are put down and when they look for the guilty.
entries.gt_2dab5ce7cf5a74: If an order promises stability, look not at the word, but at the list of exceptions and the stamp below.
entries.gt_2dd2960fbee151: take a sweep job from Barni, hold the wide bright passage, and finish the shadow after the first rush
entries.gt_2dd79cca02bf74: use the fake list for passage, sell it, or surrender it as a forgery
entries.gt_2dfa1e8a57fe1b: Sealing wax on a complaint does not protect the complainant; it just helps find him faster.
entries.gt_2ea2cdc31476d1: If the mark is fresh but the dust around it is old, do not go first.
entries.gt_2ebb77646a5fb1: In the pump room, green mode is written in the log only until the first siren.
entries.gt_2f8781704c3bdc: The noise from the torn-off school door was diverted into the corridor. The children heard not a fight, but an order to keep counting.
entries.gt_2fe33647d4bef6: If the window asks for a copy, look not at the copier, but at the pockets of those who have waited longer than you.
entries.gt_300f0844eff3d0: NII lab assistants temporarily speak in numbers: the sample began reacting to surnames.
entries.gt_308ed8b5344674: find the shaft or scheme, check the warm button, and remember the way back
entries.gt_309625b4707be5: If a pilgrim asks not about faith but about a list, that means a storehouse, guard, or price for passage is nearby.
entries.gt_30aa050b398a49: If you want to shelter with neighbors, come before the siren and do not argue with the woman at the log.
entries.gt_30de2a14f4341e: If you need one extra shot, look for a metal storeroom with an accounting cash desk.
entries.gt_30ee08c9466375: buy a token for passage, surrender it to liquidators, or steal it from the debt court
entries.gt_30fd99351f1401: The white room was sealed with sealant, but the door is checked sideways and only with a witness.
entries.gt_30ffefc0a4181a: A dark corner is like a closed file for Lampoglaz: the target exists, no signature.
entries.gt_3124d8d4816970: In the case about black palms there are more addresses, debts, and wet corners than prayers. That makes it worse.
entries.gt_312747e74e037c: When water gets more expensive, the queue is first to learn the truth.
entries.gt_31c66c59ab2fc3: The client smiles until the reward, and afterward checks whether you brought an extra witness.
entries.gt_31f0b6015a3f89: At the press the choice is simple: exchange raw material, steal a coupon, protect the shift, or learn the ingredients and spoil your appetite.
entries.gt_326986233d9981: In the Ministry, paper is more dangerous than a knife if it has a stamp.
entries.gt_32871d1bbf5fc2: They call raw material filler there. The word waste is said only by a switched-off press.
entries.gt_329b535b325192: buy Margarita's pointer card or steal it from the card archive, then carry the medcard out of quarantine
entries.gt_32a56c2c47dc98: bring meat to the storehouse, steal from the damp safe, or refuse and survive the guard's response
entries.gt_32dec53e39406b: When the dispenser runs out of layer, the storekeeper is already hiding dry rolls behind his back.
entries.gt_32dfb5d3535bd3: The Mushroom Laundry pays those who do not trample the racks.
entries.gt_331497943c8d24: check the frame after the sealant and do not count a dry gap as safe
entries.gt_3333ae5926d032: walk along the dry edge, keep a filter, and do not stand by the pipe after the first hum
entries.gt_33528f01d34ceb: Behind the Jumble Market is a counting room numbered eighty-eight. There debts are counted before names.
entries.gt_339658a4e58b6d: Stolen goods from the wild ones do not lie in a heap. They are sorted by debts: water for a knife, bandage for passage, coupon for silence.
entries.gt_33cad057926b4c: When they write "check the defect," it means someone has already eaten the evidence.
entries.gt_33dc8d8bdaab6b: Whoever returns the missing file will decide whom the archive stops looking for first.
entries.gt_33fc7662aef796: NII later looks for the jar, the Ministry for the signature, the market for the next porter.
entries.gt_34056e6a0230d6: An honest trade is rare here: water for a bandage is remembered better than pretty words.
entries.gt_3446ae21c382f3: find the room, buy without debt, refuse, close someone else's debt, or surrender the ledger
entries.gt_344c28205e6c50: If the reflection showed a pass before you did, GPVM advises stepping away from the plane without argument.
entries.gt_3458d231c98955: After someone else's container, better not smile: saw it, wrote it down, will ask after all-clear.
entries.gt_34c4c0be19edd5: If you pay like a person, sometimes they talk to you without a knife on the table.
entries.gt_34cdda274e453d: find the hot crate, buy cartridges, steal a batch, or surrender the notebook to liquidators
entries.gt_34df9b36b0e07e: A green OVS sample does not wait for a hero: tongs, filter, separate shelf, then the log.
entries.gt_34f285053acab9: The false neighbor greets you too evenly and waits for you to approach on your own.
entries.gt_34fff60be73cfa: On Eighty-Eight, a dry filter sells for more than a cartridge, but without a report.
entries.gt_3566cebf323d9d: After violet fog, people buy not calm, but one night without a door in their head.
entries.gt_3590b0ea0baece: Nightmare wins long fear. Either burn strong damage immediately, or keep the exit behind you.
entries.gt_368d5bfabf5cdd: check the heat main, stay in the center of the passage, and do not let the Beast pin you to the concrete edge
entries.gt_36a5c9e50b64c4: The lower gap in the barricade is free only on the map: rebar moves there like a guard.
entries.gt_36af11c04e77db: In Mavra's cellar, zhelemish is counted by people: a shared tray, locked reserve, and sanitary box.
entries.gt_36b89aefd835d8: If there are white threads in the storeroom right by the door, do not enter straight: a cabinet between you is worth more than a cartridge.
entries.gt_370f7cc1c5ea42: By extract, Belyak is issued without a smile, Chernyak without witnesses.
entries.gt_37285c66d5a4fd: Echoless likes an open leaf behind your back: close the door or cross the threshold backward before you see white fingers.
entries.gt_375202ad6c55d0: On Heat Main Zero, a short run can be cooled: cord, sealant, and pressure gauge, or steam will take the skin before the swearing.
entries.gt_37f3305229cbdc: A slab contract does not require a rare gun, but it does require an honest reserve. Whoever is not ready does not touch the handle.
entries.gt_3805dd1a88014c: find the cult buyer, sell the shavings, or keep the evidence on you
entries.gt_38367bcbd6487b: Armor from tempered rebar is removed by buckshot, sledgehammer, explosion, or a heavy shot.
entries.gt_387587005f0d6f: check the price with the medic, take the pills on the sortie, or trade them for passage
entries.gt_3877752bed49c4: A bad batch tears the cough loose before relief.
entries.gt_388094dde491fe: An elevator order is hidden in safes and offices where the button cannot be seen.
entries.gt_38cefa302ccc41: The quiet neighbor lost a paper, and now the whole corridor is silent as if it cannot read.
entries.gt_391c44d5ae8346: Where it smells of iodine, it usually soon smells of shortage.
entries.gt_39210c5d521298: The house committee has an ammo cabinet: Zoya sells by the piece, and Semyon watches the seal.
entries.gt_394471db5e179a: A cultist in the fog zone is not lost. He is checking the candle and the list.
entries.gt_39a6aeb70d1a91: The old woman by the radiator carries a key to the yard. There is no yard, but the kitchen door sometimes jams less with it.
entries.gt_39cd9d6a56658c: stay by the door if the seal turned cold
entries.gt_3a5269a519f164: find a witness by the common crate or prepare an explanation for the section elder
entries.gt_3acfda5b454497: If the wild ones are buying up coupons, tomorrow the queue will become shorter only on patience.
entries.gt_3ad1e9bf529112: check the bypass list and decide whether to protect the reserve or hand it over under seal
entries.gt_3b268becbc0ffc: switch off the wet homemade rig, open the bathroom, or report the circle to the patrol
entries.gt_3b3d5e42f1fad5: The crate is visible there right away, which is why it is dangerous: the household rag first thing swims to the threshold.
entries.gt_3bbd528d2f37ce: For the young, GIGAHRUSH is a normal home: frightening, wet, but normal. That is where the real trouble is.
entries.gt_3bc41fbad9e2b6: do not look for the shift in the shower room; check the line sleeve, the tool, and the wet bypass
entries.gt_3c1e28e47b121d: The green dog howls like the neighbor's puppy, except the neighbor's puppy does not wait with a whole pack behind the door.
entries.gt_3c458f3f4ea3d0: find the water-meter post, buy a coupon, or steal it from the desk
entries.gt_3d0284634caa0a: If a red line appeared in the register, someone is already arguing whether it is a bonus or bait.
entries.gt_3d45413d496245: By the radiator, any lie first warms up, then shows a crack.
entries.gt_3d4d95ab30a371: If you get lost, look for school desks. At least they do not run.
entries.gt_3d58877714c2e6: If a hook twitched behind the wall, there is still weight there; count cartridges before entering.
entries.gt_3d9203ce3ac4e3: Production puts the norm in the container, and people later argue by the seal.
entries.gt_3e0072d559c37f: You do not shut a spirit out: change position, keep distance, and if you have UV light, hit it to the tempo.
entries.gt_3e0c63ec095312: Margarita keeps the address of archive L-47 separate: the Paragraph shoots there no worse than security.
entries.gt_3e2ad353a3fabe: In the Apartments, an empty queue quickly breaks doors.
entries.gt_3e2afae94d73b9: Behind the garbage chute they keep a smoky room: there they sell oblivion and record surnames better than the house committee.
entries.gt_3ea0f950672607: The Protocolist does not bite paper: it makes paper bite you.
entries.gt_3ef8c7ddfe2bab: A sealed pneumatic capsule is worth more until no one has proven whose it is.
entries.gt_3efbbc79f1c9b9: If the clot warms in your palm, put it in a container, not into beliefs.
entries.gt_3f2cab366e28e2: Archive clearance lies beside cases where paragraphs strike down an open line.
entries.gt_3f52c4af763661: In the card archive of Sixty-Nine, debt lies as a line: interest, room, key, witness.
entries.gt_3fadac32ccddca: In the bathroom, water may be rusty, but it is still water.
entries.gt_3fe09c1dbfa4d6: The Deprived does not go toward a step, but toward light. A flashlight in your hand is like a surname in a list to it.
entries.gt_3fe0c669bc7855: Steam locksmiths say: first listen to the pipe, only then touch the valve.
entries.gt_40231189605ccb: There they ask for a document first, then a name. Sometimes the other way around is worse.
entries.gt_403b611b7ede33: They already talk about {zone} in the past tense.
entries.gt_405116bbc0e8fa: The seal on the white room is holding. If it turned cold, call sanitarians, not tenants.
entries.gt_41023baeecb157: If the doctor is silent, there are no bandages.
entries.gt_414378deb116a6: Bandages are now counted like cartridges.
entries.gt_417e0469b2eaf0: In the Living Zone there is a laundry where the linen ran out and food grew.
entries.gt_4198e70aa1bc32: Whoever paid at once at least was not looked for by debt at the lift.
entries.gt_41a509f41475b7: Matka does not guard a place. She makes a guard out of the place.
entries.gt_41c58904cfd398: find the smoking room, give a pack for the second round, and choose whether to believe the witness or buy silence
entries.gt_421ed6220ac4c5: reach the debt card archive and decide: redeem the line, forge the form, steal the receipt, or burn the book
entries.gt_42788ee9a5e86f: At the aid post, bandages run out before words of sympathy.
entries.gt_42d04c9b54072a: If the pipe gives three short knocks, it is not a rumor. It is withdrawal, and the smart ones are already running.
entries.gt_42e8cf9a1d223e: If papers around the desk have lain down as an arrow, do not cross the office through the center.
entries.gt_43114e6d9b58b4: The wild ones come to the smell of the kitchen not for glory, but because hunger is faster than shame.
entries.gt_4319064d5958a0: If green veins in the carpet run against the pattern, do not step across it to the crate: first fire or salt.
entries.gt_4324fe2118e996: Govnyak debt wears off slowly while Trofim keeps your surname in his notebook.
entries.gt_43c7bb3c180df3: A lift smelling of yesterday more often takes you to the shaft where the scheme lies under the clearance log.
entries.gt_43df4492e2e8c6: buy out the route for cigarettes, check the first door, and decide whom to sell the mistake to
entries.gt_43fe96fd884c41: In the L-47 files, the token lies beside a sealed report, and a paragraph usually hides between them.
entries.gt_441892ae2bdc41: find the water queue, buy a coupon, or steal a wet one from an arguing queueholder
entries.gt_44202509e7c858: drop the guard robot from around the corner after the volley and check the cell cabinet only after the pause
entries.gt_443444cd351bfb: listen for three short knocks in the pipe, step back to the dry edge, or check trophies after the patrol
entries.gt_443a0b5cb7691a: The robot shoots not with malice, but with procedure. A straight wet line is the worst place to argue with procedure.
entries.gt_44473cbafc2e04: In OBZH class they say: a door kit is worth more than loud courage.
entries.gt_44ea3897891b40: In accounting, keys like to lie under other people's papers.
entries.gt_450839f7ba3d9c: If a cartridge is precious, put a corner, cabinet, or closed door between you: the fragile beast loses tempo on its own.
entries.gt_450c0e8315c0eb: check the output container, take the batch, free up space, or warn the foreman
entries.gt_45f0e0f4d8a53a: bring sealing wax to the reserve, trade it for a candle, or steal the seal
entries.gt_462b56bf074618: The Slime Woman is strong while the floor shines with water or slime.
entries.gt_467210bf0f30fb: In the smoking room, rumors are faster than smoke.
entries.gt_47596de636bcae: Yakov says the lower passage is more honest than prayer: if it drips in the same place, the map is at least not completely lying.
entries.gt_47a67f32426def: The UV spotlight pushes it back briefly. This is not victory, but a window to break contact or move the light.
entries.gt_47c96d7a3cf5d4: find the kitchen, buy kasha, steal a portion, or break up the fight
